🚨🚨🚨CASTING CALL – URGENT ROLES NEEDED!🚨🚨🚨

We are casting a few last-minute roles for the upcoming hip-hop musical feature film "Worth It All." This project is high-energy, passion-driven, and will be filmed in and around Gary, Indiana.

REQUIREMENTS:

• Must be available for ALL rehearsals and shooting dates.

• First two rehearsals will be on Zoom for your convenience.

• Once lines are memorized, rehearsals will be held on-site (Gary area).

• We'll be shooting the official trailer (3 scenes) soon after.

PLEASE DO NOT WASTE OUR TIME.

If you cannot commit to:

• Zoom rehearsals,
• In-person rehearsals,
• And filming dates,

do not apply.

We’re looking for real dedication. If you’ve got the talent, passion, and availability, we’d love to see what you bring to the table.

To submit:

Text : Movie to (219) 200-4322

Let’s make something powerful together.
#WorthItAllTheMovie #CastingCall #GaryIndianaFilm #HipHopMusical #NowCasting

Roles below👇🏽👇🏽👇🏽

Wanted!!
I'm having another creative burst.
Project called "Just Go - -The Day I left
Kevin Costner "

I thought I'd do a casting call the other way around 

I want to make a short film between 10 and 30 minutes long—depending on how many actors want to participate. No pay.

You let me know if you want to participate as an actor and then I'll write a totally crazy script.

Just write "I want to" in the coments, and things can get crazy. or write a mail to Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 

Every actor is shooting on his own a scene with his smart shone about 3 sentences and I will cut of those scenes the movie.The movie will be shown on International Film festivals. 

I'm excited to hear from you. 

Thats me ;

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde, ich bin Gavin 20 Jahre alt und beginne diesen September meine Ausbildung als Mediengestalter Bild/Ton an der Lazi Akademie in Esslingen. Allerdings habe ich vor schon jetzt anzufangen ein paar Kurzfilme zu drehen, und wollte in die Runde fragen wer Interesse hätte   kreative ideen mitzugestalten und villeicht sogar auch schon coole Ideen hat. Ich  suche auch eine Schauspielerin oder Sängerin die gut English lesen und sprechen kann um  eine paar  minutiges Sci-fi Video zu kommentieren, Schreibt mich gerne an. und ich werde alles detalliert erklären. Viele Grüße und hoffe sehen  uns bald am Filmset  😊
Edit: Ich wollte euch noch fragen ob jemand schon Equipment hat um bei Kurzfilmen mitzumachen, oder ob jemand Erfahrungen hat, wo man sich Equipment am besten ausleihen kann.

items.text:
METHOD OF MADNESS - CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for UNION ACTORS to be cast in our project which will be filming in MAY 20, 21, and 22.

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: *when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?*

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go

method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

There will be a breakdown on a file attached as well but as for the character breakdowns:

NAOMI (woman, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Naomi is a woman in her 30s who dreams of having a family. However, madly in love with her husband, she allows herself to prioritize his dreams, sticking by him as he tries to make it as an actor. Her excitement for him however, dies when he begins bringing his role home. Her love turns to fear, as the man she cares for so dearly becomes unrecognizable. The pain and heartbreak of slowly losing him to madness eating at her.

JEREMY (man, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Jeremy is a man in his 30s determined to build a life for his family. Desperate to make it as an actor, and truly believing he will, he holds back on beginning his family. A sense of responsibility to impress, both as a husband and onset, pushes him to his limits. As he dedicates himself to his role, his love for his family and his craft morphs into obsession. The concept of a perfect performance consumes him until the madness of his character begins creeping into his life.

BAR TENDER (woman, 20-30, any ethnicity)

Tired and ready to go home, the bartender at a rundown bar is confused when a woman comes in asking to watch the Oscars. However, curiosity gets the best of her as she accepts the request. Her attention suddenly pulled to the stars on screen.

NEWS ANCHOR (Any, 30-40, any ethnicity)

The News anchor is a professional, who is highly skilled as a journalist. With a secondary passion for film and television, they are excited to report on the nominees for the academy awards. However, of all the performances they were especially moved by the performance of one particular actor, Jeremy Leonard.

Please send your information to our email: [methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com](mailto:methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com) and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please provide your introduction (who you are, and what role you are interested in), headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email and you will shortly get a response for your self tapes to be sent in. Keep in mind that ALL self tapes are DUE by April 08. The callbacks will be on April 15th and April 16th. The filming dates are all day May 20, 21, and 22. Please note that this set will be unpaid however, crafty will be on set. 

We hope to hear from you :)

**FIRST SILENCE – SHORT FILM CREW CALL**

We are looking for a **professional Editor & Colourist** for our upcoming short film *First Silence*.

**Produced by:** Mehr Farahani

**Directed by:** Jenna Hawkins

**Shooting Dates:** April 2nd – 6th

This is a **strong psychological drama** directed by a **film festival judge**, and will be screened at Raindance Film School as well as submitted to major festivals.

This is a great opportunity to work with a **high-level, professional crew** and be part of a powerful project.

**Requirements:**

* Previous editing & colour grading experience

* Strong showreel

**Paid Position**

[mehr2000dd@gmail.com]

items.text:
## **Casting Call - Short Film - "The Industrial Lark"**

## **Logline**

Who could have known that a dream would wake us from sleep. Open our eyes to the darkness shining throughout the City. 
## **Synopsis**

Visited by a dream from the past, an androgynous human, referred to as the Industrial Lark, awakes to the cold chilling their present reality. Meandering through London, they piece together memories of theirs from an age long gone: before industrialisation, before disconnection - when life was greener, and enthused by the harmony between humanity and nature. The deeper the Industrial Lark investigates, however, the more their isolation deepens. 
## **Character: The Industrial Lark**

The Industrial Lark needs to be tall and lank, with features melding both feminine and masculine. Age wise, in their 20s or 30s. A good character and visual reference would be early David Bowie. The role has no dialogue, besides voiceover, meaning the actor chosen must be capable of expressing a wide spectrum of emotions with but their face. We will be filming in areas such as Southwark, Hackney, and Tower Hamlets. The schedule entails a whole day, but may extend to two at the very most. The date, in mind, for shooting is late April. 

We have a Google folder with examples of film inspirations, to better display the Industrial Lark’s style: 

[https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/1aIQuCbXozBxVi1wg5i-CKVnhbwBfIkRH](https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/1aIQuCbXozBxVi1wg5i-CKVnhbwBfIkRH)

This website contains examples of our previous work, including short films, music videos, and some commercial work also:[ https://www.astray.uk/](https://www.astray.uk/)

This will be a collaborative short film, with a duration of about five to six minutes. If interested, please email wightwickmax@gmail.com
items.previewDescription: A London-based film production company that shapes video with a sharp eye and artistic touch. We film, edit, colour, and produce short films, music videos, and aesthetic videos for all sorts of media platforms.

items.text:
Casting Call - ‘No Future’ A Student Fiction Short Film
MA Filmmaking Student - 10-15mins.

Shooting mid-end of April in Nottingham and Burton on Trent.

Unpaid but Travel and Catering provided.

We’re seeking talent from Nottingham, Derby, Burton On Trent and surrounding areas for our upcoming fictional short film; "No Future”. Below is a brief outline of the narrative:

SYNOPSIS:

Acknowledging the high rates of unemployment amongst young adults in contemporary Britain, "No Future" (working title) tells the story of a young graduate navigating working life once moving back home to his blue-collar town after university. The film follows the struggles he faces reintegrating with an environment he feels he's outgrown.

Employing traits of British Social Realism, this story serves to highlight the mental and external battles hundreds of thousands of young adults up and down the country grapple with daily.

AVAILABLE ROLES:

Lead - Sam Merkel, Male, 20-25.

Supporting - Mike Merkel, Male, 22-28.

Supporting - John Merkel, Male, 35-60.

Day Players - Charlie and Will, Male, 20-28.

Extras - Factory Workers, Male, 20-28.

If interested, please shoot me a message here on Facebook or via email jacklwright20@gmail.com and I can provide more details, as well as a link to the Backstage Casting Call if preferred. Thank you!

items.text:
TIL TV-SERIEN DE BEDSTE FAMILIER - HANDEST JYLLAND 

Vi får mange henvendelser, men mangler lige de sidste på plads, der er et match med hår og tøjstr. Se nedenfor.

5 MANDLIGE statistroller som funktionær, alder ca. 25 - 50 år
1 KVINDELIG statistrolle som servitrice/kollega til birolle, 
alder ca. 20-30 år

Du skal kunne komme til Handest mandag 16/3 kl. 9.00 - ca. kl. 11 til en kostume/sminkeprøve, så kostume og hår er klar til optagelse.

Du skal senere på dagen kunne være med til optagelse 
16/3 ca. 15 - 02 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i en togvogn både holdende og kørende.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage + 1 sminke/kostumeprøve.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-M, ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne lave sideskilning med mindre naturlig skaldet, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage. Du skal kunne se uden briller, da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

KVINDE:
max højde 175, tøjstr. XS-S (der er kun 1 kostume muligt), ingen synlige tatoveringer inkl. arm, håndled, eyeliner og øjenbryn, ingen piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet, korthåret til max længde skuldre med mindre du vil lade dig klippe til dette, ingen synligt falske negle eller øjenvipper, ingen hårextensions.
Du skal kunne se uden briller da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt en selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

items.text:
ACTORS!
After being an actor for 31 years since I was 5, and a casting director for 10 years, one of the biggest headaches I’ve found on both sides of the table is finding the perfect monologue for auditions. One that is effective, but isn’t overdone.

I’ve put together 50 cast worthy female monologues for theatre in a handy digital guide, to take the effort, stress and headache out of the selection process.

I have a male version coming out in the next couple of days too.

You can grab yours here 👇🏻

https://distortedrebels.com/support-our-play/ols/products/50-cast-worthy-female-monologues-for-theatre

Break a leg!

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'distortedrebels.com 50 Cast worthy female monologueš for theatre 50 monologues that casting directors LOVE, that will make you stand out in auditions for theatre.'

**Little Flix London Film Festival is proud to announce our very first festival, supported by the BFI Inclusion Team.**

27 June 2026
BFI Stephen Street

Little Flix London Film Festival was created to provide a powerful platform for global majority and working-class filmmakers whose stories deserve visibility, opportunity, and investment.

We are seeking micro scripts between one and seven minutes long.

https://filmfreeway.com/LITTLEFLIXLONDONFilmFestival

https://Www.littleflixlondonfilmfestival.com

Info@littleflixlondonfilmfestival.com

All scripts will be read and reviewed by industry professionals. The winning screenwriter will be invited to the BFI to receive their award.'

ANNOUNCING FEBRUARY'S WINNERS🎉😎
Showcase "Enter the Matrix" 💡

Best Sci-fi or Tech Concept 💻
The Ancient Time Piece ⏰
Justin & Islien Walker

Lily, a teenage girl is stuck in a monotonous cycle, perhaps this is connected to an old eerie clock she found in her family’s basement, a clock that was still ticking when she found it…. how long had this ancient Time Piece been ticking!

items.text:
PAID ACTORS - Chicago 

Casting Call! Children, Female & Male Talent Needed

I’m the producer for this award-winning production. We are currently seeking actors to audition self-tapes,  all selected actors will be called back for an in person a audition.

If you’re interested please email us at BTDcasting2026@gmail.com and we will send you the sides to work from. 

Singing is a plus. 

The character and concept is unusual and so we are very open as to who can submit!

It's Your Time To SHINE!!!

BTD 
#whosaiditcouldntbedone 
#awardwinningplay
#letsgo

items.text:
**CALLING FILMMAKERS & CREATIVES** 🎬

I’m looking to collaborate with talented people in film for **both paid and unpaid opportunities** as we continue building and expanding our productions.

We’re currently open to connecting with:
• **Producers**
• **Directors**
• **Camera Crew**
• **Lighting Crew**
• **Sound / Audio**
• **Make Up Artists**
• **Anyone working in film who wants to collaborate**

We already have a solid team in place, but we’re **always open to expanding our network** and working with passionate creatives. Some projects are **paid**, while others are **collaborative as we raise funds for bigger productions**.

If you’re interested in **building, creating, and growing together**, feel free to **inbox me** and let’s talk.

🎥 Let’s make something great.

items.text:
History was made! 

Historical moment in RVA yesterday evening and I was blessed to be a part of it.

Unvailing of the Richmond 34 statue at Carmax Park. Met Ms. Elizabeth Rice Johnson. She is the character from 2004 I am in the docudrama, Richmond 34 The Silent Victory. Release forthcoming this year!!!
#actor 
#truestory 
#Godtiming

items.text:
## **CASTING CALL: SHORT FILM**

**Project Type:** Independent Short Film / Psychological Satire **Role:** TIFFANY (Lead) **Location:** London Area **Dates:** TBD (Expected 2-day shoot)
**THE ROLE: TIFFANY**

**Female, Playing age 18–24.** Tiffany is the ultimate "Valley Girl" archetype—ultra-feminine, superficial, and unintentionally comedic. She is wealthy, obsessed with her aesthetic, and possesses a razor-sharp, nasal vocal quality. She is perpetually on her phone, treating the entire world as a backdrop for her own social media narrative.

We are looking for an actress with **strong comedic timing** who can deliver high-intensity, "annoying" dialogue with total sincerity. The character must remain likable in her absurdity, even as she displays a complete lack of empathy for anything outside her immediate luxury bubble.

**Key Traits:**
* **Vibe:** High-fashion, "girly girl," effortlessly polished.
* **Voice:** Needs a convincing Valley Girl/Chelsea accent (upspeak, vocal fry, liberal use of the word "literally").
* **Physicality:** Must be comfortable walking in high heels on uneven terrain (dirt road/forest setting).

**SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS**:
1. **Headshot & Full Body Shot** (showing current hair/style).
2. **Acting CV or Link to Reel.**
3. **Self-Tape** of the casting script.
4. **Confirmation** that you are based in or can easily commute to the London area.

For more info contact me directly

We are an agency, so please do not apply if you are registered with a sole agency.

items.text:
this is my first short film, 
colour in the valley
shooting will be in rothervalley at the end of april/start of may
this is an upaid project however food will be provided.
certain scenes will be improv from actors.
anyone, any age is welcome to submit a short dialogue clip to mxlbxbe8327@icloud.com, mlxbxby on instagram or here on facebook.
ill be happy to answer any questions or take any tips.
the film is a coming of age short following 3 characters trying to make their summer as teens last as long as possible, only to have adulthood catch up to them faster than they expect.
if youd be interested give me a shout!

items.text:
“One can’t just shoot anybody on the street!”

 

Sound familiar from recent events in America?

 

It’s actually a line from *Charlie *and *Striptease *a double-bill of hilarious political comedies written in the Soviet era by award-winning Polish writer Slawomir Mrozek.

 

I’m delighted to share that DRH Arts is presenting these hilarious but thought-provoking plays (in English translation) at The Golden Goose Theatre in Camberwell from 21 April to 9 May. The theatre is just down the road from Oval.  

 

The plays, with four actors, expose the world of authoritarian government, secret police, informers and surveillance, through fast-moving comedy and satire. 

 

Full details can be found in the leaflet attached here and on the venue website:

 

[https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease](https://www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk/whatson/charlie-and-striptease) 

 

Follow us on Instagram @drh.arts for cast info, production updates and news.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'DRH Arts and Orsolya Nagy present Charlie+Striptease Written by Sławomir Mrożek double-bill of hilarious political theatre from the Soviet era, absurdly relevant in today's world including Trump's America and mass surveillance! 21 April-9 May 2026 7.30 pm Wed and Sat matinees 2.30 pm GOLDEN GOOSE THEATRE 146 Camberwell New Rd, London SE5 ORR www.goldengoosetheatre.co.uk'
May be an image of text

CARDIFF CASTING CALL!! 🎥
Cardiff casting call at University of South Wales, looking for an actor to play Alex, ALL experience levels are welcome!! 

Auditions 📆

10th March 

11th March 

Please don’t hesitate to reach out even if you are new to acting! 

Our precise filming dates will be 16th/17th/19th March 🎬

If you are interested, email me (producer) for more information and to book an audition slot. 

Email: 23115706@students.southwales.ac.uk

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'BETWEEN THE STATIC CASTING CALL Willow, 28, is living with schizophrenia, a condition that is increasingly affecting ecting her daily life and relationships. When she organises a birthday shopping trip for her friend.. Alex's birthday, Willow faces the internal voices and paranoia As her symptoms intensify, she must confront whether she can maintain the frienship or risk losing it altogether. 10/11th March Auditions ALEX(27) (27) ANY GENDER, 18-25 25 Looks out for their friend, trying to understand the struggle Willow is going through, trying not to let her be submerged by her diagnosis 2315706@STUDENTS.SOUTHWALES.ACUK'

items.text:
**ACTORS NEEDED! North-West (Salford)**

We’re a group of MA students studying Drama Production for TV and Film and Editing at the University of Salford. We’re collaborating with staff from the University’s Health Centre to create a series of short micro-dramas designed to raise awareness of the Health Centre and highlight the humour, warmth, and realities of navigating healthcare as a student.

Unpaid opportunity but showreel material will be provided. 

If interested please email: E.J.Parry@edu.salford.ac.uk

items.text:
Teamwork makes the dream work.
I am starting a production company that will make films grounded in realism, depth and human nature.

I am looking for other passionate filmmakers who want to create something great. I am basing my model on everyone involved in the film has an equal share in it. Too many production companies prey on upcoming actors and crew, using them and keeping all the credit and profits to themselves. Getting enough of us together, we can say no thanks, we're making our own films as a team, with enough talented individuals putting in the time and work together, we can do great things and make great films. 

Looking for actors, DOPs, sound engineers, producers, editors, assistants and everything in-between who want to be involved in starting this production company together. 

Let's build something amazing and make some great films.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'BRITGRIT PRODUCTIONS Raw gritty films rooted in realism, dark truths and the depths of human nature. that will onto Starting a production company start with short films and move features. Looking for producers, writers, DOPs, sound engineers editors, everything in- in-between who want to come on this journey with me and create something great. Let's build this together and grow together. directors, actors and'

items.text:
GULLIVER’S WORLD IS CASTING FOR PERFORMERS TO JOIN OUR EXPERIENCE CAST 

DANCERS, ACTORS, STREET THEATRE PERFORMERS, ACTIVITY RANGERS & STAGE PRESENTERS

OPEN AUDITION & INTERVIEWS : GULLIVER'S WORLD, WARRINGTON - FLEXIBLE OPPORTUNITIES FOR BOTH DAYTIME & EVENING PROGRAMMING

COME ALONG AND MEET THE CASTING TEAM
FRIDAY 20TH MARCH 2026 -  Gulliver's World Resort Hotel, Shackleton Close, Warrington, WA5 9YZ.  Registration at 6pm.  Report to the hotel reception with your CV.   Please come with suitable attire to dance.  

Free car parking available on site.  If you cannot make the audition date but are interested in 2026 opportunities, please email Casting with your CV and more information on your availability.

Street Theatre Entertainers: Delivering spooky fun and interactive experiences, captivating guests with your improvisation and character creation skills. If you have any circus skills or stilt experience this would advantageous. 
Dancers: Shine in our daytime, street theatre and evening concerts.

Stage Presenters: Bring alive the magic at our resort taking part in staged events, shows and pop up live events.

Activity Rangers: Help take our overnight adventure to the next level on our activity sleepovers.  You will be embracing the great outdoors delivering bushcraft, firefighting, den building or being the face of nature activities for educational sleep-overs and activity camps. Full concept training provided.

casting@gulliversfun.co.uk

items.text:
THE GIFT OF GAB — GET PAID FOR IT!

We're looking for American-born talkers living in Southern California for a fun 4-hour recorded VO session — answer questions, get expressive, run some dialogues, and help train the next generation of AI. We're on a mission to capture every dialect spoken across the United States. Boston, Texas, Midwest — you name it, we want it. If you grew up anywhere in this country and have an accent to prove it, you're exactly who we're looking for.

$325 an hour for 4 hours. That's $1,300 just for being yourself.

Must be American born and living in SoCal. Data release form required. Your voice goes public to support ethical AI research.

Apply at [https://voices.castingcrane.com/](https://voices.castingcrane.com/)

Or Email [casting@wyldsidemedia.com](mailto:casting@wyldsidemedia.com)

items.text:
🎬 **REAL COUPLES WANTED — Beijing Film Academy MFA Thesis Short Films**

Hi Vancouver! I'm a grad student at **Beijing Film Academy** (one of the top film schools in Asia), and I'm shooting **three short ad films** for my MFA thesis project here in Vancouver.

**The concept:** Three everyday scenarios between a couple — eating hot pot, relaxing in/around water, and jumping on a bed together — filmed with a cinematic, dreamlike visual style. Think slow motion, close-ups, and beautiful lighting. The films explore how ordinary moments between two people can feel extraordinary.

**What you'd be doing:** — Eating hot pot together (feeding each other, reacting to spicy food, lounging on the couch after) — Interacting around water (splashing, getting close, leaning against each other) — Jumping and bouncing on a bed together (pillow fights, flopping down, catching your breath side by side)

Some scenes include light physical closeness — hugs, holding each other, a camera-angled kiss (no actual lip contact). Everything is shot tastefully and artistically. This is an academic film project, not a commercial shoot.

**What I need:** ✅ A real couple ✅ Ages 20–38

📅 **March 27 or 28** (one day, within 8 hours) 

Interested? DM me and I'll share the full concept + storyboards!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'FREEFALL Real Couples Wanted Beijing Film Academy MFA Thesis BeijigFlimAtademyMEAThesisProject Project :； March 27 or 28 One Day 8 Hours Vancouver $ Paid: $100 CAD Per Person DM or Email for Full Details 357045123a@gmail.com @gmail.com 357045123'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL FOR SHORT FILM - PLAN JINN**

SHORT FILM | UBCP ULB | OPEN TO UNION/NON-UNION ACTORS | HONORARIUM

FILMING DATES: ARPIL 17-19

LOCATION: VANCOUVER, BC

DIRECTOR/WRITER: ZEESHAN DHANANI

EMAIL YOUR HEADSHOTS, DEMO-REEL, CV to: info@yymediaco.com

 

**Characters: **

**Ayesha - Lead - Female - South Asian (20-25)**

A creative, intelligent, emotionally repressed young woman torn between filial duty and personal freedom. Sensitive yet quietly defiant. Has a deep inner life, theatre lover, former painter, dreamer.

 

**Ali (Baba) - Supporting - male - South Asian (50-60)**

A hardworking immigrant father who believes security equals love. Authoritative but not villainous, he truly believes he is protecting his daughter. Carries pride, fear, and generational trauma.

 

**Fatima (ammi) - Supporting - female - South Asian (50-60)**

A gentle, deeply conditioned woman who once lived Ayesha’s fate. Torn between empathy and survival. Her silence carries decades of compromise.

 

**Imam - principal - male - Open ethnicity (40-60)**

Calm, authoritative spiritual leader called to perform an exorcism. Grounded presence amid chaos.Requires strong vocal presence. Ritual recitation (Quran verses). Controlled physical blocking during exorcism.

**Mystic - principal - Female- Open ethnicity (30-70)**

A mysterious spiritual healer whose true nature may not be human. Calm, enigmatic, unsettling.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎BE CAREFUL WHAT YOU WISH CAREFULWHATYOUWISHFOR FOR අටිම PLAN JINN ی_کیای کیای نیک WRITTEN & DIRECTED BY ZEESHANDHANANI ZEESHAN DHANANI SUPERNATURALTHILLER SUPERNATURAL THILLER‎'‎

items.text:
Jeg spiser grøntsagsgryde dag og nat og taber mig hurtigt. Opskrift med lavt kalorieindhold!
Ingredienser:
1 stor broccoli, skåret i buketter
Olivenolie
En håndfuld babykål
1 lille løg, i tern
7 små fed hvidløg, hakket
12 små tomater (foretrækkes cherrytomater eller cherrytomater), halverede ...
Jeg skal sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter... Tak.
Opskrift i toppen °°SVAR°°

items.text:
Buena Park In-Person Auditions! 

Already successfully running in Orlando, FL - opening in Buena Park in May 2026! 

In-person auditions for **The Speakeasy Murder & Other Acts of Prohibition **will be held March 26 and March 27 from 3:00pm until 7:00pm PST at the Beach Boulevard Club in Buena Park, CA. This is an open call for all principal roles, understudies, and on-call performers. 

Performers may be asked to attend call-backs, which will be held on March 27 from 7:00pm until 9:00pm PST at the same location.

Please be prepared to read from the script (sides will be provided). If auditioning for a character who sings, please prepare a 32-bar or 1-minute cut of an up-tempo Broadway or jazz standard, with a belt.

We are not accepting video submissions at this time. 

**Character Breakdowns**

**Charlie “The Tuna” Scarpelli - ***30s-60s *

Charlie is the classic 1920’s gangster. He runs the NYC nightclub called “The 38”. He’s tough and rarely hears “no” for an answer. He once had a prolonged fling with Rose (as he does with ALL his headliners). But now, he is pursuing Carmen Colada.  *Singing Role

**Mr. Cain - ***Late 20s-50s*

Mr. Cain is Charlie’s henchman. He is Charlie’s confidant and knows almost all of Charlie’s inside secrets. He is in love with Rose. Almost everyone treats Mr. Cain with respect. 

**Lawrence “Larry” Lombardo - ***Late 20s-50s*

Larry Lombardo is the wisecracking bandleader. He is in debt to Charlie which explains his employment at The 38.  He’s lighthearted, yet disgruntled. He once knew how to lead an orchestra, but now he is less than enthusiastic about his current gig. *Singing Role

**Tommy Merengue - ***Early 20s-30s*

Tommy is the emcee at The 38. He falls in love with Carmen. He owes Charlie his life. Above all, it is Tommy’s job to keep the show going. *Singing Role

**Rose Meadowlark - ***Late 20s-50s*

Rose, at one point, was the toast of the town. She is now a washed-up has-been. She has a good voice, but these days she’s damaged goods. Rose is still in love with Charlie and yearns for the days of yesteryear. Channel Lola's story of Copacabana....

*Singing Role 

**Carmen Colada - ***Early 20s-30s*

Carmen is the sweet ingénue. She will soon be the headliner at The 38, and everyone (except her) knows it. She is a little flaky and falls in love with Tommy.

*Singing Role

**Mama Scarpelli - ***Any Age*

Mamma is the quintessential Italian Mother. She is sweet yet tough. She is Charlie’s mother and owns The 38. Her ownership is her trump card, and she knows how to use it.

https://speakeasymurder.com

623-270-5115

Hi Actors and Filmmakers!! I’m still looking to fill 3 female roles. 
Emily, Angela, & Dr. Milly

Filming in Arlington Saturday March 28th & Sunday March 29th. Casting will close Monday the 23rd 8m. Lease get your self tapes in ASAP. I’d love to have you be part of the project!

Szukamy mężczyzny który wcieli się w rolę YETIEGO (w pełni zakryty strój, bez wizerunku).
Wzrost 180-185 max., szczupła sylwetka

items.text:
CASTING do Teatru Ewolucji Cienia! 

Szukamy aktorów około 20-35 lat, z dobrą kondycją fizyczną i poczuciem rytmu. 

Jeśli mieszkasz w Poznaniu, ułatwi Ci to pracę z nami – tu mamy próby, stąd wyjeżdżamy ze spektaklami  i wracamy z trasy (powroty zazwyczaj w nocy). 

Jesteśmy teatrem plenerowym, więc oferujemy angaż na sezon letni – gramy zazwyczaj w weekendy. 

Role z reguły bez tekstu, pracujemy w nurcie teatru fizycznego, wizualnego.  

Prześlij swoje zdjęcie i kilka słów o sobie na adres: [biuro@fundacjawtn.org](mailto:biuro@fundacjawtn.org)

Im szybciej się zgłosisz, tym lepiej!

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

items.text:
**Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 2 podoficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli podoficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 1 2 tygodniowym.  

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

sharedPost.text:
🎬 EXTRAS WANTED – FILM SHOOT IN SPAIN 🇪🇸

Sceneria Acting Agency is looking for extras for a new comedy feature film produced for a premium streaming platform. This is not a docu-reality production.

🎭 Roles include:
- hotel guests
- wedding guests
- pedestrians / passers-by

✈️ We provide:
    - flights (from Warsaw or Kraków)
    - All-Inclusive accommodation
    - payment of 300 PLN per shooting day

👥 Who we are looking for:
    - Black extras aged 18-80 years

📅 Shooting dates:
    - April 20–26 – Lanzarote
    - May 1–31 – Fuerteventura and northern Spain

Selected participants will take part in one or several shooting days, so we are looking for people who are available at the end of April and during May. Specific dates will be provided individually.

📩 APPLICATIONS:
sceneriaagencja@gmail.com

Please include in your message:
    - full name
    - age
    - phone number
    - height
    - measurements: chest / waist / hips
    - shoe size

Subject line: BLACK EXTRAS SPAIN

📸 Please attach current photos of your face and full body (color photos, without headwear or sunglasses, preferably with a plain background).

⚠️ Please apply only if you are seriously interested.

Thank you! ✨

message.text:
Przejazd dla rowerzystów to nie „autostrada z pierwszeństwem” 🚗

Wielu cyklistów wciąż myśli, że przejazd rowerowy automatycznie daje im pierwszeństwo. To błąd, który może kosztować zdrowie… albo życie.

❗ Fakty:
– Sam przejazd nie oznacza, że kierowca zawsze zdąży zareagować
– Wjazd „z pełną prędkością” = brak czasu na reakcję dla obu stron
– W mieście często ograniczają widoczność: auta, budynki, zarośla

⚠️ Pamiętaj:
Zanim wjedziesz na przejazd – ZWOLNIJ i upewnij się, że jesteś widoczny.
Kierowca nie jest w stanie przewidzieć wszystkiego.

🤝 Bezpieczeństwo to współpraca, nie walka o pierwszeństwo.

Daj sobie szansę. Daj ją też kierowcy.

#rower #ruchdrogowy #kierowcy #cykliści

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – NATURALISTIC LIFESTYLE VIGNETTES**
We’re casting 4 individuals for a series of short, realistic lifestyle video vignettes. These are simple, observational moments (no dialogue) that capture everyday behaviors like shopping, dining, commuting, and using your phone.

**PROJECT DETAILS**
* Shoot type: Natural, documentary-style video (no scripted lines)
* Locations: Retail store, restaurant, self-driving taxi ride, outdoor public space
* Shoot duration: ~2-3 hours per person
* Shoot dates: March 19th or March 20th (flexible scheduling)
* Small, lightweight 1-person crew (run-and-gun style)

**ROLES**
Looking for 4 individuals (one per vignette), ages 26–60:
* Any gender, any ethnicity
* Must be comfortable on camera and aware of how you come across visually
* Should feel natural and grounded, not overly theatrical
* Real, relatable everyday presence

**SCENARIOS INCLUDE**
* Shopping in a store (e.g. browsing and purchasing a product)
* Riding in a self-driving car
* Dining at a fast-casual restaurant
* Using your phone in a park or outdoor setting

**WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR**
* Strong on-camera presence without overacting
* Ability to take light direction and adjust behavior naturally
* Comfortable being filmed in public environments
* Subtle, believable expressions and reactions

**IMPORTANT NOTES**
* No dialogue or memorization required
* Minimal crew and equipment to keep things low-profile
* Some filming will take place in real public locations
* Wardrobe should be casual, everyday clothing (no logos preferred)

**COMPENSATION**
* Paid (please include your half-day rate)

**TO SUBMIT**
Please send to benjamin@joinpogo.com:
* Name, age, and location
* 2–3 recent photos (no heavy filters)
* Short presecreen video REQUIRED: Film yourself sitting at a dining table, scrolling on phone, selecting something off a shelf (can be at home), and sitting in the car as if riding. Also include several examples of corporate videos you’ve been in, or if none, just any videos you’ve acted in.

Thank you!

items.text:
**GENERAL AUDITIONS – The Bronx, NY**

Are you an actor with a passion for history? Come join us for an upcoming Live History performance in The Bronx, New York. We’re seeking local actors for a theatrical experience.

Interested? Read our casting call below!

Live History is an international theater company that specializes in interactive, site-specific performances in historic buildings, often incorporating elements of an escape room–style experience. 

This particular production features a **historical/classic script originally written in the 1700s**. Actors should be comfortable working with period language and classical text.

**Role Available: UNDERSTUDY**

**Age: 21+**

**Gender: Any**

We are casting the role of **UNDERSTUDY**.

The Understudy will:
* Cover up to **five (5) roles** in the show.
* Read for absent actors during rehearsals.
* Be prepared to move into any assigned role in the event of illness on the day of the performance.
* Potentially be used as a silent on-stage character during the show, if desired.

This is an excellent opportunity for a versatile and prepared performer who is comfortable tracking multiple roles and stepping in with confidence.

**Compensation**

Actors will be paid **$200 total as an honorarium **for one performance and all online/Zoom rehearsals.

**Show Date**

**March 22, 2026**
IN PERSON – Bronx, NY
**Rehearsals**

Rehearsals will take place primarily over Zoom with the last few in person:
* Zoom rehearsals are **one hour each**, held **3–4 times per week**.
* Most rehearsals occur during **daytime hours**.
* Some exceptions for existing conflicts may be accommodated, provided the actor can attend the majority of rehearsals.
**MANDATORY ZOOM Dress Rehearsal**

March 20 (Friday) | 7:00–9:00 PM EST
**MANDATORY IN-PERSON Dress Rehearsals**

March 21
March 22 (prior to the 2:00 PM showtime)

Attendance at all dress rehearsals  and in person show is required.

**Auditions**

Auditions will be held virtually (via Zoom) on:

Wednesday, March 4th | 1:00 PM – 6:00 PM EST

Auditions will consist of a scripted cold read.

**To Request an Audition**

Please submit a resume and headshot to:
[livehistoryusa@gmail.com](https://)

Subject line:
**THE BRONX AUDITIONS**

Actors must be 21+ and have a professional resume and headshot to be considered.

For more information, visit:
[www.livehistoryshows.com](https://www.livehistoryshows.com)

Wanted!!
I'm having another creative burst.
Project called "Just Go - -The Day I left
Kevin Costner "

I thought I'd do a casting call the other way around 

I want to make a short film between 10 and 30 minutes long—depending on how many actors want to participate. No pay.

You let me know if you want to participate as an actor and then I'll write a totally crazy script.

Just write "I want to" in the coments, and things can get crazy. or write a mail to Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 

Every actor is shooting on his own a scene with his smart shone about 3 sentences and I will cut of those scenes the movie.The movie will be shown on International Film festivals. 

I'm excited to hear from you. 

Thats me ;
https://m.imdb.com/name/nm1591928/?ref_=tt_ov_1_1
The project :

A project: 
https://m.imdb.com/title/tt40706407/?ref_=nv_sr_srsg_1_tt_8_nm_0_in_0_q_just%20go%20the%20day

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde
Kurze Frage, wenn ich eine neue Filmseite aufmachen möchte für die Crew, damit jeder sieht was abgeht und durchgehende Communication herrscht, was bietet sich besser an  Facebook WhatsApp oder was ganz anderes. Ich habe aktuell das Problem das viele Leute manche Plattformen garnicht besitzen, und es ist nicht einfach alle auf einer Seite zusammenzubringen. Oder über welche Social Media Seiten findet ihr am meisten Jobs für Filmproduktionen. Gibt mir bitte Bescheid welche Erfahrungen ihr gemacht habt!

I've been working with Aileen Gonsalves (RSC actor/director) on a set of card-driven exercises for actors to hone their craft, derived from her method. 

It's coming to Kickstarter soon; you can sign up for launch notification now.
items.previewDescription: A toolkit of authentic connection exercises for actors and non-actors

items.text:
Second Marriage At First Sight has opened its dating database for the first time and wants to hear from individuals from Australia and the UK, aged 18 or over, who would be willing to relocate to the other side of the world for love. We’re pairing iconic Brits  and Aussies  from previous series with new partners for the ultimate second chance at love… you don’t need to have been married previously to apply!

To apply for Second Marriage at First Sight, visit: [shortaudition.com/smafs](https://shortaudition.com/smafs?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExeEdCd1dQd3djVkw1bVJnS3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR77QbR3ESRYv2afLtR8s1urfSzEEM6Z4D4t7SS4WPa-YluqYTk7QEIPlilM4Q_aem_9h4jq0biWEZZrSWgZAoupQ) 

Terms and conditions apply. #mafs

items.text: Has your child appeared in a TV show? If yes then your voice matters more than ever. The TV Industry Human Rights Forum needs you and your perspectives for an important project on children's rights. Behind every young performer is a parent navigating unique opportunities, challenges, and decisions—and your experience can help shape a better future for families just like yours. Please complete this confidential survey and share it with others in your networks. You’ll be contributing valuable insights that can improve support systems, working conditions, and overall wellbeing for children on TV productions. Follow the survey link for more information about the project.

items.text:
Hello! Despite my profile name on this app, my name is Nyx Grace Wudi! I am 15 (until next month when I am 16) and a professional actor. I have done both local and traveling theater performances, and I was recently cast in a film shooting in LA this summer. Please do not hesitate to reach out with any questions or jobs I can be a part of! I will paste my professional profile with my resume below. Have a lovely day! 

https://www.backstage.com/tal/Nyx_Grace/

topComments.text: Please have your mom post for you. At your age, your safety comes first. Your mom should put a parent monitored account on top if your profile as well. Im a model and talent management owner, so safety for my minors is super important to me

items.text:
**ACTORS!**

Is your acting class working for you? 

Do you come away from your class with showreel style quality clips you can use?

At Scene 2 Screen we are active actors, up on our feet week after week shooting amazing clips that showcase you at your best!

Lead by working actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) 

Classes take place weekly in South Manchester and cost just £85 for a month of classes (4 x 2 hour classes)

Email: [Scene2screenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2screenMCR@gmail.com) to enquire today!

items.title: **ACTORS!**

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – TikTok / Facebook Video Presenter (Manchester)

We’re looking for confident, natural on-camera presenters / actors to feature in short-form, social media-style videos, filmed on set in Manchester.

This is not traditional acting — we want people who feel comfortable talking directly to camera in a TikTok / Facebook Reels style. Think engaging, relatable, confident, and modern.

🔹 The Role

Present short, punchy scripts straight to camera

TikTok / Facebook-style delivery (15–60 seconds)

High-energy but natural — not cheesy or overly salesy

Filmed in a studio / set environment

🔹 Ideal For

Actors, presenters, creators, or confident personalities

Anyone comfortable being themselves on camera

People who understand short-form social video

Strong communication and screen presence

🔹 What We’re Looking For

Confident speaking to camera

Clear, engaging delivery

Able to follow a script or bullet points

Professional, reliable, and adaptable

🔹 Location

📍 Manchester – on set

🔹 How to Apply

Please send a short video (phone-recorded is absolutely fine) showing:

You speaking directly to camera

TikTok / presenter-style delivery

30–60 seconds is perfect

Example: https://vimeo.com/1119845100/ea1fd86ea4?fl=ip&fe=ec

 

📧 Email your video to:

david.s@springbokgroup.co.uk

Include:

Your name

Age range

Location

Any relevant experience (optional)

 

Paid opportunity.

We’re reviewing submissions on a rolling basis.

TikTok / Facebook-style delivery (15–60 seconds)

High-energy but natural — not cheesy or overly salesy

Filmed in a studio / set environment

🔹 Ideal For

Actors, presenters, creators, or confident personalities

Anyone comfortable being themselves on camera

People who understand short-form social video

Strong communication and screen presence

🔹 What We’re Looking For

Confident speaking to camera

Clear, engaging delivery

Able to follow a script or bullet points

Professional, reliable, and adaptable

🔹 Location

📍 Manchester – on set

🔹 How to Apply

Please send a short video (phone-recorded is absolutely fine) showing:

You speaking directly to camera

TikTok / presenter-style delivery

30–60 seconds is perfect

Example: https://vimeo.com/1119845100/ea1fd86ea4?fl=ip&fe=ec

 

📧 Email your video to:

david.s@springbokgroup.co.uk

Include:

Your name

Age range

Location

Any relevant experience (optional)

 

Paid opportunity.

We’re reviewing submissions on a rolling basis.

POTNIA THERON de Hélia Correia

DIA MUNDIAL DO TEATRO

27 MARÇO
Sexta- feira às 21h30

CINE-TEATRO SÃO JOÃO, PALMELA

info e reservas
Bilheteira do Cine-Teatro São João e em BOL.PT:
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/173353-potnia_theron-cine_teatro_s_joao/

POTNIA THERON do grego antigo “Senhora dos animais” é um motivo artístico milenar que descreve a divindade feminina com domínio absoluto sobre a natureza selvagem. O termo aparece pela primeira vez na Ilíada de Homero, para descrever a deusa Ártemis, sendo, no entanto, um conceito muito mais antigo, com raízes em divindades femininas da Idade do Bronze e até do Neolítico.
Hélia Correia escritora consagrada, escreve de um fôlego, este poema épico inédito, a partir da antiguidade clássica, para o espectáculo que Maria João Luís encena como uma opereta não convencional, abordando e reflectindo sobre as relações de forças entre os géneros masculino e feminino.

​com
MARIA JOÃO LUÍS, SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO, ANTÓNIO LOURENÇO MENEZES

cenografia JOSÉ MANUEL CASTANHEIRA
música original JOSÉ PEIXOTO
desenho de luz, fotografia PEDRO DOMINGOS
encenação MARIA JOÃO LUÍS

assistência de encenação BEATRIZ VIEIRA DE CARVALHO
assistência de produção FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA
direção de produção PEDRO DOMINGOS

produção TEATRO da TERRA 2026 | M/12

parceria
Municipio do Seixal 

Apoio
República Portuguesa - Cultura, juventude, desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

**Βάκχες – Από τη σκηνή της εκπαίδευσης στη σκηνή της παράστασης**

Με αφορμή τις «Βάκχες» του Ευριπίδη, ο σπουδαίος και βραβευμένος ηθοποιός Μάνος Βακούσης έρχεται για 8 μόνο συναντήσεις στον πολυχώρο +αίσθημα, στο Μοναστηράκι.

Ένα βιωματικό σεμινάριο θεάτρου βασισμένο στο σπουδαίο έργο «Βάκχες», όπου θα δουλέψουμε:
υποκριτική, αυτοσχεδιασμό, δημιουργία χαρακτήρα, κίνηση και σκηνική παρουσία.

Μια διαδρομή από τη σκηνή της εκπαίδευσης στη σκηνή της παράστασης.

Θα τηρηθεί αυστηρά σειρά προτεραιότητας.

Πληροφορίες / Κρατήσεις:
693 329 3229

items.text:
**038  Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn ‘’Leon’’  ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzy w wieku 45 – 50 lat o obwodzie w klatce 100/105 cm, pas 95 - 105  )  do roli wuja głównej bohaterki. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic w różnym wieku. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 2 3 tygodniowym. Najbliższe nasze spotkanie 14.12.25

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.title: **038  Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn ‘’Leon’’  ( casting on-line )**

items.text:
**Szukam modelki  Gliwice/Katowice ( Śląsk )**

 

Szukam pań które nie krępują się własnego ciała i chciałaby mieć ciekawą pamiątkę w postaci klimatycznych zdjęć. Wiem jak bardzo jest ważna akceptacja własnego ciała bo przez to też możemy inaczej funkcjonować. Przez takie zdjęcia można również tego dokonać. Sesja w głównej mierze jest jako taki motywator.

 

Zapraszam do Gliwic do mojego domowego mini studia foto na sesje tematyczne. Finalnie wychodzi  **od 15 do 20 zdjęć.** Do wyboru są 2 opcje tematyczne. Koszt takiej sesji to tylko **150 zł**. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Podpisuje również oświadczenie o wykonywanych zdjęciach w konkretny dzień sesji. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania:

** **

**Temat 1 – ‘’Kobieta mafii 1930’’**

Postać kobiety osadzona w 1930 roku w roli bogatej kobiety, która trudni się gangsterstwem. Przewidziane są ujęcia m.in. przy stoliku na którym są pieniądze, wino, rewolwer. Tło jest wydrukowane w formie muru, cegieł. Motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 2 – ‘’Wampirzyca w baroku 1700’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana najpierw w suknie czarną oraz peleryne z kapturem. Do tego czarna długa peruka oraz czarne paznokcie. W kolejnym etapie sesji motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 3 – ‘’Duchy lasu’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w wianek i w pelerynę z otwartym przodem. W dłoni ma zakrwawiony sierp. Usta czarne oraz paznokcie.

** **

**Temat 4 – ‘’Kleopatra’’**

Postać kobiety z czarna peruką w stylu Kleopatry. W prawej recę trzymac będzie berło Anubisa a w drugiej ręcę księgę umarłych. Na biodrach będzie mieć jedynie klasyczne odzienie z 2 części. Na klatce piersiowej założony będzie napierśnik złoty.

** **

**Temat 5 – ‘’Odważna Piratka ‘’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w strój piracki: kamizelka, koszula, kapelusz, spodnie i kapelusz a do tego rekwizyty pistolet czy kufel piwa.

 

**Temat 6 – ‘’Lara Croft ‘’**

Postać kobiety wzorowanej z tytułowej gry Tomb Rider Lary Croft.  Kobiete będzie przebywać w swojej bazie i badać nowe znaleziska pod lupą.

 

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę**

** **

**Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia**

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

Więcej informacji na Priv

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Kobieta mafii 1930 LaraCroft ara Croft Duchy Duchylasu lasu Piratka Wampirzyca'

Szukam pań które nie krępują się własnego ciała i chciałaby mieć ciekawą pamiątkę w postaci klimatycznych zdjęć. Wiem jak bardzo jest ważna akceptacja własnego ciała bo przez to też możemy inaczej funkcjonować. Przez takie zdjęcia można również tego dokonać. Sesja w głównej mierze jest jako taki motywator.

 

Zapraszam do Gliwic do mojego domowego mini studia foto na sesje tematyczne. Finalnie wychodzi  **od 15 do 20 zdjęć.** Do wyboru są 2 opcje tematyczne. Koszt takiej sesji to tylko **150 zł**. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Podpisuje również oświadczenie o wykonywanych zdjęciach w konkretny dzień sesji. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania:

** **

**Temat 1 – ‘’Kobieta mafii 1930’’**

Postać kobiety osadzona w 1930 roku w roli bogatej kobiety, która trudni się gangsterstwem. Przewidziane są ujęcia m.in. przy stoliku na którym są pieniądze, wino, rewolwer. Tło jest wydrukowane w formie muru, cegieł. Motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 2 – ‘’Wampirzyca w baroku 1700’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana najpierw w suknie czarną oraz peleryne z kapturem. Do tego czarna długa peruka oraz czarne paznokcie. W kolejnym etapie sesji motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 3 – ‘’Duchy lasu’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w wianek i w pelerynę z otwartym przodem. W dłoni ma zakrwawiony sierp. Usta czarne oraz paznokcie.

** **

**Temat 4 – ‘’Kleopatra’’**

Postać kobiety z czarna peruką w stylu Kleopatry. W prawej recę trzymac będzie berło Anubisa a w drugiej ręcę księgę umarłych. Na biodrach będzie mieć jedynie klasyczne odzienie z 2 części. Na klatce piersiowej założony będzie napierśnik złoty.

** **

**Temat 5 – ‘’Odważna Piratka ‘’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w strój piracki: kamizelka, koszula, kapelusz, spodnie i kapelusz a do tego rekwizyty pistolet czy kufel piwa.

 

**Temat 6 – ‘’Lara Croft ‘’**

Postać kobiety wzorowanej z tytułowej gry Tomb Rider Lary Croft.  Kobiete będzie przebywać w swojej bazie i badać nowe znaleziska pod lupą.

 

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę**

** **

**Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia**

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

Więcej informacji na Priv

CASTING CALL: PAID NON-UNION
EDUCATIONAL - LOS ANGELES

SUBMIT - sumeet.dang@icloud.com

Please submit with fitness pictures

LOCATION - Los Angeles area 

SHOOT DATE: 1 day, either Friday, March 27 or Saturday March 28th, need both days available. 

RATE: $200 for 8-10 hour shoot

UNION STATUS - NON-UNION

CAST NEEDS:

1 athletic MALE fitness model who is comfortable doing sustained breathing practices for long periods and who are comfortable sitting cross-legged and being guided through meditation practices. Open ethnicity, aged 25-40. 

1 athletic FEMALE fitness model who is comfortable doing sustained breathing practices for long periods and who are comfortable sitting cross-legged and being guided through meditation practices. SOUTH ASIAN/EAST INDIAN, aged 25-40. 

MORE INFORMATION: 

This is for an education meditation and breath work series for an accredited Indian Knowledge System meditation practice with research backed meditation practices for improving mental health.

This will be a really fun and relaxing shoot. You will be guided through many relaxing energizing meditation practices that will leave you feeling vibrant. 

To submit, please email: 

- headshot

- Some fitness pictures

- Confirm you’re comfortable doing longer periods of breath-work exercises

SUBJECT LINE: ROLE - Actor Name

Example: Fitness Model - Jane Smith

items.text:
**Seeking Director of Photography for Low Budget Dramedy Feature Film - "Incautious" (Chicago, IL)**

**“Incautious” Plot Summary:**

A stay-at-home mother struggles to watch over her children as she finds herself addicted to alcohol and other drugs. A broken man takes out his anguish on his wife and children.

***Compensation:***

**Rate: **Paid (Send me your rates)
**Payment:** Up to 17 Shooting Days, all on weekends

**Tentative Shoot Days: (All on Weekends)**

Sunday, May 3, Saturday, May 9, Sunday, May 10, Saturday, May 16, Sunday, May 17, Saturday, May 23, Sunday, May 24, Saturday May 30, Sunday, June 7th, Saturday, June 13, Sunday, June 14, Sunday, June 21, Saturday, June 27, Sunday, June 28, Sunday, July 12, Saturday, July 18, Backup Day - Saturday, July 25

**Duties:**

1. Bring his/her own camera equipment to the film set
2. Execution of Cinematography plan
3. Setting up Camera equipment in a timely efficient manner

4. Determining elements such as filters, shutter angles, focus, depth, of field and camera distance

5. Answering any questions the Director may have regarding Cinematography

**Role Requirements:**

1. A Reel of Visual Work

2. Be an approachable team player
3. Must show up on time and have good time management skills

4. Good technical camera operating skills
5. Good organizational skills

6. A great eye for detail
7. The ability to plan ahead regarding camera setups

**Director's Bio:**

Harry is a passionate filmmaker who has been watching movies since as long as he can remember. Some of his favorite films include, "Memento", "The Dark Knight", "The Lord of the Rings" trilogy, "Alien", “The Shining” etc. He has seen over 11,000 films and is as crazy about movies as any individual you will ever meet. Harry has worked on a number of various films, and has written, produced, directed, and edited "515", "Enter the Room", “In the Backseat”, “Bay for Blood” and “The Corridor Crossing”.

**More Info, Contact Information:**
If you are interested in this project, please contact me at edgewaterfilmproductions@gmail.com.

Also, feel free to visit my website. The link is listed below.
http://www.edgewaterfilmproduction.com/

**Contact Name: **Harry Waldman
**Contact Email: **edgewaterfilmproductions@gmail.com
**Contact Address:** Chicago, Illinois, 60626, United States
**Organization:** Edgewater Film Productions

items.text:
🎬 CASTING NOTICE – STUDENT SHORT FILM

Title: Incoherent
Project Type: Junior Thesis Project – Loyola Marymount University
Genre: Psychological Thriller / Drama
Director: Royce Haddock
Producers: Ava Correia, Walter Bridgewater
Shoot Dates: 3-Day Shoot (Friday,  March 20 / Saturday, March 21/ Sunday, March 22)
Location: Los Angeles/ Ladera Heights, CA
Compensation: $100/day (3 days total) + Meals & Credit

🎥 PROJECT OVERVIEW
Incoherent is a psychological thriller/drama centered on grief, memory, and the fractured relationship between a father and his daughter.
Abel, a grieving father, is trapped in a recurring nightmare that forces him to relive the day he lost one of his daughters. On the eve of the 10-year anniversary, the nightmare changes—he can no longer wake up. As he searches for answers within this psychological loop, a real-life emergency unfolds, putting his surviving daughter in danger.
At its core, this is a story about a man learning how to live again after unimaginable loss—and a father and daughter struggling to reconnect after years of emotional distance.

🎭 CASTING ROLE
ABEL (Lead)
Gender: Male
Ethnicity: Black / African American
Age Range: Late 30s – 40s
Role Type: Lead
Shoot Requirement: Must be available all 3 shoot days
Character Description:
Selfless, steadfast, and emotionally guarded. Abel is a devoted single father who once had two daughters, but after the tragic loss of one at a young age, he has become emotionally withdrawn.
Ten years later, he remains psychologically stuck in that moment—avoiding anything that reminds him of the loss. His unresolved grief prevents him from being fully present in the life of his surviving daughter, now 18, creating a quiet but painful emotional distance between them.
Throughout the film, Abel is forced to confront the truth he’s been running from, making this role heavily performance-driven with strong emotional depth.
Additional Notes:
Facial hair preferred
Must be comfortable portraying intense emotional scenes (grief, distress, vulnerability)
Strong dramatic acting ability required

📩 SUBMISSION DETAILS
Headshot • Resume • Demo Reel (if available)
Must confirm availability for all shoot dates
Submit To: IncoherentShortFilm@gmail.com
Subject Line: INCOHERENT – ABEL SUBMISSION – [Your Name]

ʙᴀꜱᴇᴄᴀᴍᴘ: ᴏᴏꜱᴛᴇʀᴢᴇᴇ ꜱᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴘᴀʀᴋ ᴀɴᴅ ʀɪᴅᴇ

* ᴀɴʏ ɢᴇɴᴅᴇʀ

ᴛᴏ ᴀᴘᴘʟʏ, ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ɴᴀʟᴇᴅɪ ᴏɴ 0761802729 ᴡɪᴛʜ:
* ʙʀɪᴇꜰ # | ꜰᴜʟʟ ɴᴀᴍᴇ 
* ᴍᴇᴀꜱᴜʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ
* 1 ʀᴇᴄᴇɴᴛ ʜᴇᴀᴅꜱʜᴏᴛꜱ
* 2 ʀᴇᴄᴇɴᴛ ꜰᴜʟʟ ʟᴇɴɢᴛʜ

Hi! I am casting for a short student film shooting on Friday, April 3rd, looking to lock actors ASAP.

Roles:

Female Lead (25-40): Expressive, comfortable with stylized, campy tone.

Male Role (25-40): Intimidating presence, open to silly, heightened performance.

Project:

Campy sci-fi with a strong focus on costume, makeup, and lighting.

Stylized, visually-driven, and fun (not heavy drama).

Shoot Details:

Date: Friday, April 3rd

Time: 9am call- 5pm wrap

Location: CCA Lowry Studios  

Perks: 

Lunch + Snacks provided 

Great opportunity for footage and collaboration

Looking for:

Reliable and communicative

Comfortable taking direction

Open to exaggerated, stylized performance 

Experience level is flexible! 

Thank you!

items.text:
Casting call
Project title: Glideshare short film 

Run time 30 minutes 

Written by: Augy Johnston 

Producer/director: Tyler Schacht 

Genre: Horror 

Production company: Superstar TV Entertainment 

Location: Morrison Colorado, Littleton Colorado and brush Colorado

Dates: April 24-26

Non-unions and unions are welcome to submit 

Paid project 

Synopsis 

A creepy ride share driver who picks up two passengers teddy and Patricia who are dating, Patricia doesn't want to get in the ride share but her boyfriend insists it's ok and everything will be fine. When they get in they realize the driver is driving them to an unknown location that they didn't put as their destination. Ride share driver turns out to be a high profile murderer and kidnapper. Patricia escapes but her boyfriend gets killed by the driver.

Character

Patricia 

Teddy's girlfriend, who was sexually assaulted in her past and has a lot of flashbacks and has emotional breakdowns. 5 foot 5 inches in height Long black hair, Latina. Slim.

To submit, email Tyler Schacht at tylerschacht8@gmail.com with resume and demo reel if available

sharedPost.text:
Wanted!!
I'm having another creative burst.
Project called "Just Go - -The Day I left
Kevin Costner "

I thought I'd do a casting call the other way around 

I want to make a short film between 10 and 30 minutes long—depending on how many actors want to participate. No pay.

You let me know if you want to participate as an actor and then I'll write a totally crazy script.

Just write "I want to" in the coments, and things can get crazy. or write a mail to Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 

Every actor is shooting on his own a scene with his smart shone about 3 sentences and I will cut of those scenes the movie.The movie will be shown on International Film festivals. 

I'm excited to hear from you. 

Thats me ;
https://m.imdb.com/name/nm1591928/?ref_=tt_ov_1_1
The project :

A project:

items.text:
🎭 PERFORMING JOB OPPORTUNITY 🎭
📍Manchester Based 

 MPP Character Entertainment is now casting!

We have an exciting year ahead, filled with magical events and unforgettable parties and we’re looking for talented performers to join our team!

About the Role:
• Events and parties are primarily based in the North West, so local performers are preferred.
• A driving license and access to a car are preferred (petrol costs covered).
• We are casting for a variety of characters, you might be the perfect fit!
• We’re looking for performers who are fun, bubbly, and kind.

We have temporary jobs, short-term work, weekly work and cover opportunities available, so whether you’re looking for regular bookings or just a few gigs, we’d love to hear from you!

How to Apply:

Send a CV and recent headshot/picture to manager@mppcharacterentertainment or drop us a private message.

We can’t wait to bring more magic to life with you! ✨
MPP Character Entertainment 🌺🐬

WITH A RECENT HEADSHOT AND YOUR CV FOR CONSIDERATION‎'‎

items.text:
LONDON ADULT ACTING DROP IN CLASS

Taught by professionals working in the industry - JUST £20

I hope this is OK to post here.

VRASP is coming to London and we are SO ready for you.

Starting Wednesday 29th April, our weekly drop in screen acting class lands back in Brixton (Brixton Road Youth Centre, 143-145 Brixton Road, London, SW9 6LZ).

Whether you are completely new to acting or a seasoned performer ready to level up, this class is for you. All abilities welcome, ages 18 and over. No commitment, just book online and show up.

At VRASP you are taught by working industry professionals, including founder Verona Rose, actress, writer, and presenter with credits including Netflix's Top Boy, BBC's Horrible Histories, BBC's Fully Blown and ITV2's Secret Crush to name a few.

As a VRASP student you can access:

Professional headshots and showreel footage through your training.
 
VIP networking events with industry insiders 

Red carpet and industry events alongside Verona and the VRASP community 

The opportunity to join the VRASP talent agency as a natural next step in your career

Every Wednesday from 29th April 7pm to 9pm Brixton Road Youth Centre, London Just £20 per session

Book at www.vrasp.co.uk or drop us a message if you have any questions.

items.summary:
LONDON ADULT ACTING DROP IN CLASS

Taught by professionals working in the industry - JUST £20

I hope this is OK to post here.

VRASP is coming to London and we are SO ready for you.

Starting Wednesday 29th April, our weekly drop in screen acting class lands back in Brixton (Brixton Road Youth Centre, 143-145 Brixton Road, London, SW9 6LZ).

Whether you are completely new to acting or a seasoned performer ready to level up, this class is for you. All abilities welcome, ages 18 and over. No commitment, just book online and show up.

At VRASP you are taught by working industry professionals, including founder Verona Rose, actress, writer, and presenter with credits including Netflix's Top Boy, BBC's Horrible Histories, BBC's Fully Blown and ITV2's Secret Crush to name a few.

As a VRASP student you can access:

Professional headshots and showreel footage through your training.
 
VIP networking events with industry insiders 

Red carpet and industry events alongside Verona and the VRASP community 

The opportunity to join the VRASP talent agency as a natural next step in your career

Every Wednesday from 29th April 7pm to 9pm Brixton Road Youth Centre, London Just £20 per session

Book at www.vrasp.co.uk or drop us a message if you have any questions.
items.title: LONDON ADULT ACTING DROP IN CLASS

items.text:
🗣️ REAL PEOPLE CASTING 🥞
Live in Philly? Gen Z? Love to bake + make pancakes? This one’s for you! 🍪

Working with Dig Projects (https://digprojects.com/) to find participants for an upcoming research project (think of it as a cross between marketing and a documentary).

PAID opportunity where we’ll be chatting with real baking enthusiasts about their preferences and everyday lives — it’s not an ad, just internal research featuring authentic voices.

🥐 If you or someone you know might be a good fit, please fill out this quick form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdVyZR6W1W6WXF-TwJi6wAznzhXPHJIkRFOmur-sT707YrdeA/viewform

🧁 Feel free to share with friends, family, neighbors, anyone in the Philadelphia area who isn't afraid to talk about baking (oh yeah, and if you refer someone who gets selected, you get $100!). 

Questions? Hit my comments!

#marketingresearch #strategyinsights #documentaryfilmmaking #casting #philly #philadelphia #realpeople #GenZ #baking

items.text: Hope this is ok to post. Support local performers and help us bring new stories to the screen ❤️

sharedPost.text:
Action! are going filming. 🎬
Our community theatre group is taking the next step, creating original short films so our actors, writers, and creatives can gain real film experience and build showreels.
To do it properly, we need a small filming kit.
So we’ve launched our first Crowdfunder.
If you can spare £5, you’ll be directly helping local performers create something real and giving people opportunities they wouldn’t otherwise have.
Every single contribution moves this forward.
Support us here:

https://crowdfunder.co.uk/actionfilm

If you can’t donate, sharing this helps more than you know.
Thank you for backing local creativity.

items.text:
CASTING: **ROLA GŁÓWNA** (wiek wizualny 28-32 lata).

Szukamy **kobiety-aktorki-artystki** do filmu **„Ciało obce”** – do roli wymagającej skrajnej ekspresji emocjonalnej: od paraliżującej apatii po gwałtowną histerię i fizyczny ból.

Poszukujemy osoby o wysokiej wrażliwości, zdolnej oddać skomplikowany portret kogoś zmagającego się z hafefobią, traumą i bolesnym wyobcowaniem we własnej cielesności.
* **Projekt:** Niezależny dramat psychologiczny, festiwalowy, płatny.
* **Miejsce zdjęć:** Góra Kalwaria.
* **Termin:** Kwiecień/Maj 2026 (4–5 dni, termin do uzgodnienia).
* Wymagania: Odwaga emocjonalna, wysoka wrażliwość.

**ETAPY CASTINGU:** I. Casting online | II. Casting na żywo.

Zgłoszenia przez stronę WWW (zakładka CASTING):

[www.ompictures.pl](www.ompictures.pl)

Wymagane zdjęcia: portret, cała sylwetka oraz twarz sauté. Mile widziane portfolio.

Czekamy na Twoją energię!

#casting #aktorka #film #GóraKalwaria #hafefobia #ompictures #filmindependent #dramat #sauté

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde
Kurze Frage, wenn ich eine neue Filmseite aufmachen möchte für die Crew, damit jeder sieht was abgeht und durchgehende Communication herrscht, was bietet sich besser an  Facebook WhatsApp oder was ganz anderes. Ich habe aktuell das Problem das viele Leute manche Plattformen garnicht besitzen, und es ist nicht einfach alle auf einer Seite zusammenzubringen. Oder über welche Social Media Seiten findet ihr am meisten Jobs für Filmproduktionen. Gibt mir bitte Bescheid welche Erfahrungen ihr gemacht habt!

topComments.text: Wir haben es über WhatsApp gemacht. Jeder hat es und funktioniert am besten. Erstell einfach ne Gruppe.
Ja, eine WhatsApp-Gruppe hat sich gut bewährt.

items.text:
Hi, wir suchen als kleine No Budget Produktion 8 Komparsen die Lust haben uns bei einem Teaserdreh nächste Woche am 28.03 in Berlin von 8:30 bis ca. 17:00 zu unterstützen.

Der Teaser wird gedreht, um damit Finanzierungen für die spätere Spielfilmproduktion zu akquirieren.

Es wird ein Rom Com Drama & geht um Beziehungen nach Krebs und mit MS. 

Schreibt mir gerne eine DM bei Interesse mit Foto.

Wir würden uns sehr freuen, wenn wir 8 Menschen zusammenkriegen. Gerne so divers wie möglich.

attachments.ocrText: May be a doodle of text that says 'HELP Wir drehen einen Film! Und suchen 8-10 Menschen, die Lust haben, im Hintergrund dabei zu sein und uns damit bei unserem Teaserdreh zu unterstützen. Der Teaser hilft uns dabei, die Finanzierung zu sichern und einen ersten Eindruck vom Look & Feel des Films zu zeigen. Es geht um Beziehungen nach Krebs und mit MS. Wenn alles gut läuft, würden wir euch super gerne a auch später im bezahlten Projekt berücksichtigen Berlin (Gerdan's Café) 28.03. ab 8：30 ROSUGATN Essen, gute Stimmung & tolle Leute inklusive Schreib mir, wenn du Zeit & Lust hast und zu unterstützen'

items.text:
Casting call for A Curated Exit (Theatre, Paid, non union)
**Production Company**

Shot in the Dark Productions
**Producer(s)**

Kristy Woollam and Richard White
**Director:**

Richard White
**Union Status**

Non-Union
**Project Type**

Theatre / Live Performance
**Compensation Details**

Profit Share
**Performance Date(s) and Locations**

Winnipeg International Fringe Festival July 13-26, 2026

Edmonton International Fringe Festival August 11-23, 2026

Vancouver - 3 night run, fall 2026 (TBD)
**Submission Deadline**

Friday, April 4, 2026

**Audition Dates and Location**

Vancouver. Call backs week of April 20 - 26th.
**Submission Instructions**

Please contact *[[Kristywoollam@gmail.com](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)* to receive sides for a self tape.
Please submit your headshot, acting resume, and self tape to *[[Kristywoollam@gmail.com](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)*.
**Project Synopsis**

A Curated Exit is a one act contemporary drama with strong comedic elements. It examines grief, love, and the commercialization of death. Zoe, a funeral director, sells The Device, nanotechnology that vaporizes the body at death and replaces it with a programmed experience. When her husband Steve dies suddenly, Zoe's quest to craft perfect endings collides with loss, memory, and the fragile line between technology and humanity.
**Casting for:**

***STEVE***** **Male lead. Any ethnicity. Age 30-50. Steve is a high school history teacher. He's a geek and loves pop culture. He is gentle and playful and often uses jokes to deflect direct questions about his emotions. He has a strong sense of social justice. Steve loves his wife deeply, but dies suddenly without telling her his biggest secret.

items.text:
🎬 Casting Call
For a commercial project filming in Thailand, we are looking for native speakers.

Male, 35–40 years old, solid / respectable appearance.

Languages still needed:

• Greek

• Japanese

• Dutch

• Turkish

• Portuguese

Native Spanish and Italian speakers have already been confirmed.

Project details:

• 1 shooting day

• Fee: $3000

• Flights and accommodation are covered

If you are a native speaker of one of the listed languages, please send:

• Your name and age

• Current city

• Recent photos

• A short self-tape

Thank you! 🎬

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '> CASTING CALL Filming in THAILAND Seeking Native Speakers: Portuguese Greek Japanese Dutch Turkish *Spanish & Italian speakers already confirmed* Male, 35-40 years old $3000 for 1 day Flights & Hotel Covered Send Photos & Self-Tape! Self-'

sharedPost.text:
G.Riedl, Songwriting, Keys, Producer, - LeeLoo, Voc, - Mark Corradetti, bass, - Paul Simmons drums, - Clint Wells, guit.
Mit „Earth“ beginnt für uns ein neues Kapitel.
Der Song ist die erste Veröffentlichung aus unserem kommenden Album „Timeless Elements“ – einem Werk, das sich den vier großen Elementen widmet: Earth, Water, Fire und Air.
„Earth“ ist für uns mehr als ein Songtitel. Es geht um Boden unter den Füßen, um Herkunft, Verantwortung, Verletzlichkeit und darum, was bleibt, wenn vieles ins Wanken gerät. 
Wir freuen uns sehr, dieses erste Stück mit euch zu teilen.
Hört rein, schaut es euch an und schreibt uns, was „Earth“ in euch auslöst.
#Schos #Earth #TimelessElements #TimelessMusic #Rock #SouthernRock #WestcoastRock #BluesRock #LyricVideo #NewMusic
Mehr über Schos:
https://bandschos.com

items.text:
🇬🇧 ENGLISH CAPTION
🎬 CAST & CREW CALL – “Late, But Alive”

We’re currently working on an independent short film in Germany and looking for passionate, creative individuals to join the project.

This is an unpaid opportunity, but a real chance to:

• Gain on-set experience

• Build a strong portfolio

• Receive IMDb credit

• Be part of a meaningful cinematic story

We’re looking for:

• Actors

• Assistant Director

• Cinematographer

• Sound Designer

If you’re serious about filmmaking and want to grow, this is your chance.

📩 Send your portfolio or info to:

harounarrah@icloud.com

Let’s create something real.

⸻

🇩🇪 GERMAN CAPTION

🎬 CAST & CREW GESUCH – „Late, But Alive“

Wir arbeiten aktuell an einem unabhängigen Kurzfilm in Deutschland und suchen motivierte und kreative Menschen, die Teil des Projekts werden möchten.

Dies ist eine unbezahlte Gelegenheit, aber eine echte Chance, um:

• praktische Erfahrung am Set zu sammeln

• dein Portfolio aufzubauen

• einen IMDb Credit zu erhalten

• Teil einer bedeutungsvollen Filmproduktion zu sein

Gesucht werden:

• Schauspieler:innen

• Regieassistenz

• Kameramann/-frau (DoP)

• Sound Designer

Wenn du ernsthaft im Filmbereich wachsen willst, bist du hier richtig.

📩 Sende dein Portfolio oder Infos an:

harounarrah@icloud.com

Lass uns gemeinsam etwas Besonderes schaffen

https://m.imdb.com/title/tt40724743/

TO APPLY, EMAIL YOUR PORTFOLIO OR INFO TO harounarrah@icloud.com INCLU DE THE POSITION YOU RE INTERESTED IN IMDb Let' S make something special together.‎'‎

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 12/2026

AND THE OSCAR GOES TO....

Wir präsentieren die Highlights der diesjährigen Verleihung des Academy Awards. 

Abseits des wichtigsten Filmpreises starten äußerst interessante Neuerscheinungen. Erleben Sie Ryan Gosling in DER ASTRONAUT,  den vielleicht besten SciFy Film seit Kubriks 2001 oder das Regiedebüt von Kirsten Stewart (THE CHRONOLOGY OF WATER).

Animationstechnisch präsentieren wir eine ziemlich turbulente Zugfahrt in TIERISCH ABGEFAHREN.

Abgerundet wird die Sendung im Oscarmonat März mit Awardwinnern best Song and best Score der letzten 90 Jahre sowie Songs aus den aktuellen Filmen.

Mittwoch 18.3.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)
